QUAD360 ← Back
Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 2026  ·  Effective immediately

🔒 Plain English summary: Your business data belongs to you. We don't sell it, share it, or read it. It is encrypted at rest and in transit. You can delete it at any time.

1. Who We Are

Quad360 is a financial management application for small and medium-sized businesses. We are operated by Quad360 ("we", "us", "our"). For questions about this policy, contact us at quadriabiodun9911@gmail.com.

2. What Data We Collect

We collect only what is necessary to provide the service:

  • Account information — your email address and business name when you register
  • Financial data — transactions, invoices, assets, loans, and inventory that you enter into the app
  • Settings — your currency preference, language, and business settings
  • PIN — stored in encrypted form on your device only; we never see your PIN

We do not collect: payment card details, government ID, location data, contacts, or any data from other apps on your device.

3. How We Use Your Data

Your data is used exclusively to:

  • Display your financial dashboard, reports, and insights
  • Sync your data securely across your devices
  • Send you password reset emails if you request one
  • Improve the app based on anonymised, aggregated usage patterns

We never use your financial data for advertising, profiling, or sale to third parties.

4. How We Protect Your Data

🔐

AES-256 Encryption

All data encrypted at rest — same standard used by banks and governments.

🌐

SSL/TLS in Transit

All data encrypted during transmission. No plain-text transfers ever.

📱

Device Secure Storage

PIN stored in your phone's hardware secure enclave — same as banking apps.

🛡️

SOC 2 Infrastructure

Hosted on Supabase — independently audited, enterprise-grade cloud security.

🔒

PIN Lockout

5 wrong attempts triggers a 15-minute lockout that persists across restarts.

👤

Zero Access Policy

Quad360 staff cannot read your business financial data.

5. Who We Share Data With

We share data with no one except the following essential service providers:

  • Supabase (supabase.com) — cloud database and authentication infrastructure. Your data is stored on their servers under our account and is not accessible to them for any other purpose.

We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, advertising networks, or any other tracking services.

6. Data Retention

Your data is retained for as long as your account is active. You can permanently delete all your data at any time by going to Settings → Danger Zone → Clear All Data in the app. This action is irreversible.

If you wish to delete your account entirely, email us at quadriabiodun9911@gmail.com and we will remove all your data within 30 days.

7. Your Rights

Depending on your location, you may have the following rights:

  • Access — request a copy of all data we hold about you
  • Correction — request correction of inaccurate data
  • Deletion — request deletion of your account and all associated data
  • Portability — export your data via Settings → Export Data (CSV/JSON)
  • Objection — object to how we process your data

To exercise any of these rights, contact us at quadriabiodun9911@gmail.com. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Nigeria (NDPR Compliance)

We comply with the Nigeria Data Protection Regulation (NDPR) 2019. Nigerian users have the right to consent, access, rectification, and erasure of personal data. Our lawful basis for processing is contractual necessity — we need your data to provide the service you signed up for.

9. United Kingdom (UK GDPR Compliance)

For users in the United Kingdom, we comply with the UK General Data Protection Regulation (UK GDPR) and the Data Protection Act 2018. Our lawful basis for processing personal data is contractual necessity (Article 6(1)(b)). You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO) at ico.org.uk.

10. Children's Privacy

Quad360 is intended for business use by adults aged 18 and over. We do not knowingly collect data from anyone under 18. If you believe a minor has registered, contact us immediately.

11. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy as the app grows. We will notify registered users by email of any material changes at least 14 days before they take effect. Continued use of the app after that date constitutes acceptance.

12. Contact Us

For any privacy questions, data requests, or concerns:

  • Email: quadriabiodun9911@gmail.com
  • Response time: Within 30 days

© 2026 Quad360. All rights reserved.  ·  Home  ·  Open App
